summary: Build an autonomous AI engine (Dharma-Sync) to translate legal prose into verified physical actions, reducing the time from 'Judgment Received' to 'Department Tasked' and closing the loop on physical implementation through AI-driven visual auditing.
optimization_claims: Reduces the time from 'Judgment Received' to 'Department Tasked' from weeks to minutes
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
